init.description: Short interview, write PRODUCT.md + STRATEGY.md (goals), nudge harness automation

ingest.description: File customer research, metrics, or notes into memory (not part of the loop)

insights.description: Compare product to memory; one file per suggestion

roadmap.description: Rank latest suggestions and write brief for the top item

next.description: Top roadmap item — hand off to your coding agent (auto-runs roadmap if stale)

review.description: Optional sweep for stale evidence and drift from your goals
